stories.title: 'Little shocked': Steelers react to Rodgers' retur...
stories.summary: Quarterback Aaron Rodgers took the practice field with his Steelers teammates at OTAs on Monday after signing his one-year contract.

stories.title: Sources: City expect Guardiola exit after season
stories.summary: Manchester City are resigned to losing Pep Guardiola as their manager at the end of the season, sources have told ESPN.

stories.title: Tech's Sorsby files injunction, seeks '26 eligibil...
stories.summary: Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby has filed for an injunction against the NCAA on Monday, seeking his college eligibility for the 2026 football season.

stories.title: PCA regrets 'choice of words' in exchange with fan...
stories.summary: Cubs center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong apologized Monday for his "choice of words" in a heated exchange with a fan during the team's loss to the White Sox on Sunday.

stories.title: Struggling Yanks consider bringing Cole back early...
stories.summary: The Yankees are deciding whether to skip Gerrit Cole's final rehab start and instead have him make his season debut at Yankees Stadium.
